item.title: 27 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 294
item.description:
My cat is 15 years old and has graduated high school, college, and graduate school with me. ~u/lovekaleah
He is in the hood of an amauti and wearing a harness.
He was so brave and tired after a long evening and ready to go home and rest. Quana for being such a good boy Oliver!
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: He's the only father I've ever known
item.description: And he can rot for all I care August 22nd, 1955 - July 17, 2025. He *claims* demons made him do it. I don't believe that for a second. Rather, my mother was starting to realize that Trump is a fascist and that she was mislead. I believe she was stabbed to death for trying to talk my stepfather out of the MAGA cult.
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy

item.title: The IDF soldiers were killed…in Lebanon…they are an invading army…I can’t comprehend being this stupid.
item.dc:creator: kendottack

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1724 (Bread and Circuses Sunday)
item.description:
Let's get this Bread (and circuses). Ah shit, "Bread and Circuses" was there the whole fucking time for these Roman history dumps from me. *goes back to change the title*
All Roman history dumps i make include "Byzantine" history because the "Byzantines" considered themselves Romans. [Flame war begins in comments probably]
"Halfdan was here"
Seriously, Mithradates VI Eupator is one of the most fascinating people of classical antiquity as far as I'm concerned.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep. Glory. Glory Pippin." ___
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Fathers Day
item.description: This one is for everybody who didn't have a father in their life. Don't fret today. Become the leader the absent father should have been.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: This MAGA shit has gotten way out of hand
item.description: Absolutely fucking ridiculous, this motherfucker must've had Saul Goodman or Fletcher Reede or fucking Phoenix Wright or some shit Also, I say this as a Texan myself, Texas fucking sucks. Religion bigots, ignorant assholes, and redneck misogynists everywhere. More fucked up than anything I've ever seen. Not to mention the heat, but that's totally unrelated. Or maybe it's just so hot because of ALL THE FUCKING GUNS WE SHOOT HERE. Fun fact: On average, 12 to 13 Texans die EACH DAY due to gun violence. Whoops :/
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInLeBronsPuzzy

24
25
26 Man Tax: Adam Demos
So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #506
item.description: A three-time Olympian reached into the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool to feel a strip of peeling paint, and Park Police led him away in handcuffs. The paint is peeling and the water has gone swamp green, two weeks after a $14 million renovation. Donald Trump ordered the pool drained and repainted, then rushed the job for the Fourth of July. Engineers say the blue he chose likely fed the algae bloom that took over within days. None of it is sabotage, but he called it sabotage and put the National Guard around the basin. His evidence was a chemical-attack story born on a satirical Facebook page, one that climbed through right-wing accounts until it reached his Truth Social feed late that night. Handed a fiasco with his name on it, Donald Trump's government chose to handcuff a 67-year-old rather than blame the man who picked the paint and set the deadline. I've emailed 7,901 stories over 506 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260620-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/boylehts-fire [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june20 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/china-spacex [4] https://go.govbrief.today/cassidy-specialed [5] https://go.govbrief.today/boston-faa [6] https://go.govbrief.today/olympian-arrested [7] https://go.govbrief.today/seattle-evictions Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Emma is the GOAT
item.description:
Emma Vigeland co-moderation with Matt Bernstein (he/they) on Majority Report.
Emma speaking at the NYC-DSA slates rally in Bushwick
The man with the small head made her cry.
When progressives win primaries and the corporate Democrats doesn't want to vote
I have no fucking idea why CNN invites Emma so rarely.
Not taking Cory Booker seriously!
This is what The Majority Report crew would sound like if they worked for Fox News
Majority Report can be watch everywhere (youtube, twitch, spotify, iTunes etc.) for free every working day. Everyone should know them. https://majorityreportradio.com/ https://open.spotify.com/show/54XamSLDhv579AvZJzK6Bd https://www.youtube.com/user/SamSeder

item.title: No dirt! No dirt! No dirt!… Hold on—there's dirt?!
item.dc:creator: rs6000

item.description: In Fredericton, New Brunswick, a remarkable transformation is taking place thanks to tech millionaire Marcel LeBrun. After selling his social media monitoring company, Radian6, to Salesforce for an eight-figure sum, LeBrun decided to pour $4 million of his personal fortune into tackling the region's growing housing crisis with a revolutionary, dignified solution. Through his non-profit foundation, 12 Neighbours, LeBrun successfully constructed a gated village composed of exactly 99 fully equipped tiny homes. Built systematically in a local warehouse, each compact house features a living area, bedroom, three-piece bathroom, full kitchen, solar panels, and a front deck, offering unhoused residents a secure space to rebuild their lives.
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: I didn't even think of this but it's probably absolutely true.
item.dc:creator: defrostedtauntaun

item.description: I came out to my parents 8 years ago. After five years of them misgendering me and mourning 'the son they'd lost' I went no contact. Every conversation with them was emotionally like trying to hug knives. I'm happy for all the people out there who still have dads. I miss mine so much. I still love him but I can't trust my parents not to hurt me in the deepest ways. Anyway, just needed to rant, get it off my chest to my usersub peeps.
item.dc:creator: ThatOtherGirlYouKnow

item.title: Esmeralda (from The Hunchback of Notre Dame) - Cosplayed by Lauren, aka Dressesandcapes
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/MrXaJYz
She's an award-winning costume designer, and as such was a cosplay judge on DropoutTV's Tournament of Champions Sauce: https://dressesandcapes.com/
She took a selfie with legendary Disney animator Floyd Norman
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd
